description: Configure the self-hosted Jitsi Meet instance for high-fidelity music instruction by updating the web configuration at /home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/custom-config.js. The configuration must enable stereo audio (config.stereo), disable peer-to-peer mode (config.p2p.enabled), set the maximum Opus bitrate to 510kbps (config.opusMaxAverageBitrate), and disable noisy microphone detection (config.enableNoisyMicDetection). Apply the changes to the Jitsi Meet service located at /home/ga/jitsi/. Verify the configuration via the browser console at http://localhost:8080 and save a screenshot showing the enabled stereo setting to /home/ga/music_mode_verification.png.
